# Tac UI Native

> Cross-platform design system — React Native component library with 30+ components, design tokens, and icons.

## Quick Start

```bash
pnpm add @tac-ui/native @tac-ui/icon-native @tac-ui/tokens
```

```tsx
import { Button, Input, Card } from '@tac-ui/native';
import { Search, Star } from '@tac-ui/icon-native';
```

Wrap your app with `TacNativeProvider` for theming:

```tsx
import { TacNativeProvider } from '@tac-ui/native';

export default function App() {
  return (
    <TacNativeProvider>
      <YourApp />
    </TacNativeProvider>
  );
}
```

## Styling

- No Tailwind — uses React Native `StyleSheet.create()`
- Theme values from `useTacNativeTheme()` context hook
- Colors: `theme.colors.*` (e.g. `theme.colors.foreground`, `theme.colors.point`)
- Spacing, radius, shadows from `@tac-ui/tokens/native`
- Animation via React Native `Animated` API with spring configs from `constants/motion`

```tsx
import { useTacNativeTheme } from '@tac-ui/native';
import { StyleSheet, View } from 'react-native';

function MyComponent() {
  const { theme } = useTacNativeTheme();
  return (
    <View style={[styles.box, { backgroundColor: theme.colors.card }]} />
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  box: { padding: 16, borderRadius: 12 },
});
```

---

## Components

### Button

```tsx
<Button variant="primary" size="md">Click</Button>
<Button variant="point" leftIcon={<Star size={16} />}>Favorite</Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="sm" iconOnly leftIcon={<Search size={16} />} />
<Button variant="ghost" iconOnly leftIcon={<Search size={16} />} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'outline' \| 'ghost' \| 'point' \| 'destructive'` | `'primary'` |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| iconOnly | `boolean` | `false` |
| leftIcon | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| rightIcon | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |
| style | `ViewStyle` | - |
| onPress | `() => void` | - |

### Input

```tsx
<Input label="Email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
<Input inputSize="sm" placeholder="Small input" />
<Input error errorMessage="Required" leftIcon={<Search size={16} />} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| inputSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| label | `string` | - |
| helperText | `string` | - |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |
| leftIcon | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| rightIcon | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| containerStyle | `ViewStyle` | - |
| editable | `boolean` | `true` |

Extends `TextInputProps` from React Native.

### Textarea

```tsx
<Textarea label="Message" placeholder="Type here..." rows={4} />
<Textarea error errorMessage="Too short" rows={6} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| helperText | `string` | - |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |
| rows | `number` | `4` |
| containerStyle | `ViewStyle` | - |
| editable | `boolean` | `true` |

Extends `TextInputProps` from React Native.

### Select

```tsx
<Select
  label="Country"
  options={[
    { value: 'us', label: 'United States' },
    { value: 'kr', label: 'South Korea' },
  ]}
  value={selected}
  onChange={setSelected}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| options | `SelectOption[]` | - |
| value | `string` | - |
| onChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |
| placeholder | `string` | `'Select an option'` |
| selectSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| helperText | `string` | - |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Combobox

```tsx
<Combobox
  options={[{ value: 'react', label: 'React' }, { value: 'vue', label: 'Vue' }]}
  value={value}
  onChange={setValue}
  placeholder="Search framework..."
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| options | `ComboboxOption[]` | - |
| value | `string` | - |
| onChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |
| placeholder | `string` | `'Search…'` |
| emptyText | `string` | `'No results found'` |

### Card

```tsx
<Card variant="default">
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Body content</CardContent>
  <CardFooter><Button size="sm">Action</Button></CardFooter>
</Card>

<Card interactive onPress={handlePress} variant="accent">Premium card</Card>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'accent' \| 'flat'` | `'default'` |
| interactive | `boolean` | `false` |
| onPress | `() => void` | - |

Sub-components: `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`

### Badge

```tsx
<Badge>Default</Badge>
<Badge variant="success">Active</Badge>
<Badge variant="error" interactive onPress={handlePress}>Error</Badge>
<Badge count={5} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'secondary' \| 'destructive' \| 'outline' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info'` | `'default'` |
| interactive | `boolean` | `false` |
| onPress | `() => void` | - |
| count | `number` | - |

### Checkbox

```tsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms" />
<Checkbox checked={checked} onChange={(val) => setChecked(val)} />
<Checkbox indeterminate label="Select all" />
<Checkbox filled label="With background" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| checked | `boolean` | - |
| defaultChecked | `boolean` | `false` |
| indeterminate | `boolean` | `false` |
| filled | `boolean` | `false` |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |
| onChange | `(checked: boolean) => void` | - |

### RadioGroup & Radio

```tsx
<RadioGroup value={value} onChange={setValue}>
  <Radio value="a" label="Option A" />
  <Radio value="b" label="Option B" />
  <Radio value="c" label="Option C" disabled />
</RadioGroup>
```

| Prop (RadioGroup) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | - |
| defaultValue | `string` | - |
| onChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |

| Prop (Radio) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | required |
| label | `string` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |
| filled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Switch

```tsx
<Switch />
<Switch label="Dark Mode" defaultChecked />
<Switch checked={on} onChange={(val) => setOn(val)} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| checked | `boolean` | - |
| defaultChecked | `boolean` | `false` |
| onChange | `(checked: boolean) => void` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Toggle

```tsx
import { Moon, Sun } from '@tac-ui/icon-native';

<Toggle
  checked={isDark}
  onChange={(checked) => setIsDark(checked)}
  iconOn={<Moon size={16} />}
  iconOff={<Sun size={16} />}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| checked | `boolean` | `false` |
| onChange | `(checked: boolean) => void` | - |
| iconOn | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| iconOff | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |
| style | `ViewStyle` | - |

### Slider

```tsx
<Slider defaultValue={50} min={0} max={100} />
<Slider label="Volume" showValue value={vol} onChange={setVol} />
<Slider filled={false} defaultValue={50} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| showValue | `boolean` | `false` |
| filled | `boolean` | `true` |
| min | `number` | `0` |
| max | `number` | `100` |
| step | `number` | `1` |
| value | `number` | - |
| defaultValue | `number` | `0` |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |
| onChange | `(value: number) => void` | - |
| onChangeEnd | `(value: number) => void` | - |

### SegmentController

```tsx
<SegmentController
  items={['Day', 'Week', 'Month']}
  selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
  onSelect={(index) => setSelectedIndex(index)}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| items | `string[]` | required |
| selectedIndex | `number` | `0` |
| onSelect | `(index: number) => void` | - |

### DatePicker

```tsx
<DatePicker label="Start date" value={date} onChange={setDate} />
<DatePicker mode="datetime" label="Date & Time" />
<DatePicker mode="month" label="Month" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `Date` | - |
| onChange | `(date: Date) => void` | - |
| label | `string` | - |
| mode | `'date' \| 'datetime' \| 'month'` | `'date'` |
| minDate | `Date` | - |
| maxDate | `Date` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### ColorPicker

```tsx
<ColorPicker label="Brand color" value={color} onChange={setColor} />
<ColorPicker label="Color" showInput value="#3B82F6" />
<ColorPicker label="Theme" colors={['#EF4444', '#22C55E', '#3B82F6']} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | `'#000000'` |
| onChange | `(color: string) => void` | - |
| label | `string` | - |
| colors | `string[]` | Default palette |
| showInput | `boolean` | `false` |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Tabs

```tsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab1" variant="underline">
  <TabsList>
    <TabTrigger value="tab1">Account</TabTrigger>
    <TabTrigger value="tab2">Password</TabTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabContent value="tab1">Account settings content</TabContent>
  <TabContent value="tab2">Password settings content</TabContent>
</Tabs>
```

| Prop (Tabs) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | - |
| defaultValue | `string` | `''` |
| onValueChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |
| variant | `'underline' \| 'pill' \| 'outline'` | `'underline'` |

| Prop (TabTrigger) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | required |
| icon | `React.ReactNode` | - |

Sub-components: `TabsList`, `TabTrigger`, `TabContent`

### Accordion

```tsx
<Accordion type="single" defaultValue={['item-1']}>
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger>Section 1</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Content 1</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
<Accordion type="multiple" outline>...</Accordion>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| type | `'single' \| 'multiple'` | `'single'` |
| defaultValue | `string[]` | `[]` |
| glass | `boolean` | `false` |
| outline | `boolean` | `false` |

Sub-components: `AccordionItem`, `AccordionTrigger`, `AccordionContent`

### Dialog

```tsx
<Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)}>
  <DialogHeader>
    <DialogTitle>Confirm</DialogTitle>
    <DialogDescription>Are you sure?</DialogDescription>
  </DialogHeader>
  <DialogFooter>
    <Button variant="outline" onPress={() => setOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
    <Button onPress={handleConfirm}>Confirm</Button>
  </DialogFooter>
</Dialog>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| open | `boolean` | `false` |
| onClose | `() => void` | - |
| backdrop | `'opaque' \| 'blur' \| 'transparent'` | `'opaque'` |

Sub-components: `DialogHeader`, `DialogTitle`, `DialogDescription`, `DialogFooter`

### Alert

```tsx
import { CheckCircle } from '@tac-ui/icon-native';

<Alert variant="success" icon={<CheckCircle size={16} />}>
  <AlertTitle>Saved</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Your changes have been saved.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info'` | `'default'` |
| icon | `React.ReactNode` | - |

Sub-components: `AlertTitle`, `AlertDescription`

### Snackbar

```tsx
<Snackbar
  message="Item deleted"
  variant="success"
  visible={visible}
  duration={4000}
  onDismiss={() => setVisible(false)}
  action={{ label: 'Undo', onPress: handleUndo }}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| message | `string` | required |
| variant | `'default' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info'` | `'default'` |
| visible | `boolean` | `true` |
| duration | `number` (ms, 0 = no auto-dismiss) | `4000` |
| onDismiss | `() => void` | - |
| action | `{ label: string; onPress: () => void }` | - |
| icon | `React.ReactNode` | - |

### Dropdown

```tsx
<Dropdown trigger={<Button variant="outline">Menu</Button>} align="start">
  <DropdownTitle>Actions</DropdownTitle>
  <DropdownItem onPress={handleEdit}>Edit</DropdownItem>
  <DropdownDivider />
  <DropdownItem destructive onPress={handleDelete}>Delete</DropdownItem>
</Dropdown>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| trigger | `React.ReactNode` | required |
| open | `boolean` | - |
| onOpenChange | `(open: boolean) => void` | - |
| align | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end'` | `'start'` |

Sub-components: `DropdownItem`, `DropdownTitle`, `DropdownDivider`

### Avatar

```tsx
<Avatar src="https://example.com/photo.jpg" alt="User" size="md" />
<Avatar fallback="JH" size="lg" status="online" />
<Avatar size="sm" status="busy" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'` | `'md'` |
| src | `ImageSourcePropType \| string` | - |
| alt | `string` | - |
| fallback | `string` | - |
| status | `'online' \| 'offline' \| 'busy' \| 'away'` | - |

### Chip

```tsx
<Chip variant="filter" selected={isActive} onPress={() => setActive(!isActive)}>Active</Chip>
<Chip variant="input" leftIcon={<Tag size={12} />} onDismiss={() => {}}>React</Chip>
<Chip variant="suggestion">Suggestion</Chip>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'filter' \| 'assist' \| 'suggestion' \| 'input' \| 'glass'` | `'filter'` |
| selected | `boolean` | `false` |
| onPress | `() => void` | - |
| onDismiss | `() => void` | - |
| leftIcon | `React.ReactNode` | - |

### Progress

```tsx
<Progress value={75} />
<Progress value={60} variant="circular" size={80} showLabel />
<Progress value={40} barSize="lg" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `number` | `0` |
| max | `number` | `100` |
| variant | `'linear' \| 'circular'` | `'linear'` |
| size | `number` | `32` |
| barSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| showLabel | `boolean` | `false` |
| color | `string` | theme point |

### Table

```tsx
<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow>
      <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
      <TableHead>Email</TableHead>
    </TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    <TableRow>
      <TableCell>John</TableCell>
      <TableCell>john@example.com</TableCell>
    </TableRow>
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

Sub-components: `Table`, `TableHeader`, `TableBody`, `TableFooter`, `TableRow`, `TableHead`, `TableCell`, `TableCaption`

| Prop (TableRow) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| selected | `boolean` | `false` |

### Stepper

```tsx
<Stepper
  steps={['Account', 'Profile', 'Done']}
  currentStep={1}
  orientation="horizontal"
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| steps | `string[]` | required |
| currentStep | `number` | required |
| orientation | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | `'horizontal'` |

### Divider

```tsx
<Divider />
<Divider variant="thick" />
<Divider variant="inset" />
<Divider variant="withLabel" label="OR" />
<Divider orientation="vertical" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'full' \| 'inset' \| 'thick' \| 'withLabel'` | `'full'` |
| orientation | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | `'horizontal'` |
| label | `string` | - |

### Skeleton

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="text" width="100%" height={16} />
<Skeleton variant="circular" width={48} height={48} />
<Skeleton variant="rectangular" width="100%" height={200} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'rectangular' \| 'circular' \| 'text'` | `'rectangular'` |
| width | `DimensionValue` | - |
| height | `DimensionValue` | `16` |
| borderRadius | `number` | auto by variant |

### Indicator

```tsx
<Indicator variant="linear" />
<Indicator variant="circular" size={32} />
<Indicator variant="circular" size={48} color="#3B82F6" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'linear' \| 'circular'` | `'linear'` |
| size | `number` | `32` |
| color | `string` | theme point |

### CodeBlock

```tsx
<CodeBlock code={`const x = 1;`} language="typescript" />
<CodeBlock glass language="jsx" code={`<Button>Click</Button>`} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| code | `string` | required |
| language | `string` | - |
| glass | `boolean` | `false` |

### EmptyState

```tsx
import { Inbox } from '@tac-ui/icon-native';

<EmptyState
  icon={<Inbox size={48} />}
  title="No items"
  description="Create your first item to get started."
  action={<Button>Create Item</Button>}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| icon | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| title | `string` | required |
| description | `string` | - |
| action | `React.ReactNode` | - |

### VStack & HStack

```tsx
<VStack gap="md" align="center">
  <Input label="Name" />
  <Button>Submit</Button>
</VStack>

<HStack gap="sm" justify="between">
  <Badge>Tag 1</Badge>
  <Badge>Tag 2</Badge>
</HStack>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| gap | `'none' \| 'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' \| '2xl'` | `'md'` |
| align | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'stretch' \| 'baseline'` | VStack: `'stretch'`, HStack: `'center'` |
| justify | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'between' \| 'around' \| 'evenly'` | `'start'` |
| wrap | `boolean` | `false` |

### FloatingMenuBar

```tsx
import { FloatingMenuBar } from '@tac-ui/native';
import { Home, Search, Bell, User } from '@tac-ui/icon-native';

const tabs = [
  { key: 'home', icon: (p) => <Home {...p} />, label: 'Home' },
  { key: 'search', icon: (p) => <Search {...p} />, label: 'Search' },
  { key: 'inbox', icon: (p) => <Bell {...p} />, label: 'Inbox', badge: 3 },
  { key: 'profile', icon: (p) => <User {...p} />, label: 'Profile' },
];

<FloatingMenuBar items={tabs} activeKey="home" onSelect={setTab} />
<FloatingMenuBar items={tabs} activeKey="home" onSelect={setTab} glass />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| items | `FloatingMenuBarItem[]` | required |
| activeKey | `string` | required |
| onSelect | `(key: string) => void` | required |
| glass | `boolean` | `false` |
| style | `ViewStyle` | — |

---

## Icons

```tsx
import { Search, Star, Check, X, ArrowRight, TacLogo } from '@tac-ui/icon-native';

<Search size={16} color={theme.colors.foreground} />
<TacLogo size={24} />
```

All [lucide-react-native](https://lucide.dev/icons) icons are re-exported from `@tac-ui/icon-native`, plus the custom `TacLogo`.

---

## Design Tokens

```tsx
import { diaSpring, duration, springConfigs } from '@tac-ui/native';
import { primitiveColors, semanticTokens, spacing, typography, motion } from '@tac-ui/tokens';
```

### Theme Colors (via `useTacNativeTheme`)

```tsx
const { theme } = useTacNativeTheme();
// theme.colors.*
// theme.mode: 'light' | 'dark'
```

Key color tokens: `background`, `foreground`, `border`, `card`, `cardForeground`, `primary`, `primaryForeground`, `secondary`, `secondaryForeground`, `muted`, `mutedForeground`, `point`, `pointForeground`, `success`, `successBg`, `successForeground`, `error`, `errorBg`, `errorForeground`, `warning`, `warningBg`, `warningForeground`, `info`, `infoBg`, `infoForeground`, `surface`, `inputBg`, `inputBorderRest`

### Motion Constants

```tsx
import { duration, springConfigs, diaSpring } from '@tac-ui/native';

// Duration (ms)
duration.instant  // 80
duration.fast     // 150
duration.normal   // 220
duration.slow     // 320
duration.complex  // 450

// Spring configs (for Animated.spring or withSpring)
springConfigs.snappy   // { stiffness: 260, damping: 32, mass: 1 }
springConfigs.gentle   // { stiffness: 180, damping: 30, mass: 1 }
springConfigs.bouncy   // { stiffness: 260, damping: 30, mass: 1 }
springConfigs.magnetic // { stiffness: 400, damping: 40, mass: 0.8 }
springConfigs.entrance // { stiffness: 180, damping: 28, mass: 0.9 }
```

### Utils

```tsx
import { createStyles } from '@tac-ui/native';

// Helper for typed StyleSheet.create() with theme
const useStyles = createStyles((theme) => ({
  container: { backgroundColor: theme.colors.card, padding: 16 },
}));
```

---

## Theming

`TacNativeProvider` injects the theme context. Access it with `useTacNativeTheme()`:

```tsx
import { TacNativeProvider, useTacNativeTheme } from '@tac-ui/native';

function App() {
  return (
    <TacNativeProvider defaultMode="system">
      <MyApp />
    </TacNativeProvider>
  );
}

function ThemedComponent() {
  const { theme, mode, setMode } = useTacNativeTheme();
  // mode: 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'
  // theme.colors.* — resolved color values for current mode
}
```

---

## Tech Stack

- TypeScript (strict), React Native, React 18/19
- React Native Animated API for animations
- Spring configs compatible with react-native-reanimated `withSpring()`
- lucide-react-native for icons
- ES2020 target, dual CJS/ESM
